pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java compiler source and target properties from 1.8 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation fails on JDK 21 if source/target are set to 1.8 or if modern language features are used without setting the release flag.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JAXB API dependency to resolve missing javax.xml.bind classes in Java 11+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime NoClassDefFoundError for javax.xml.bind.DatatypeConverter when using jjwt 0.9.1 on JDK 11+ because JAXB was removed from the JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use the 'release' flag instead of source/target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation fails or produces incorrect bytecode if source/target are used with JDK 21 features; 'release' is the recommended approach for cross-compilation and module path handling.
